generated_oml:
// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance GantryCraneEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "AS5600 angular position encoder for trolley and hoist motion tracking in the lab-scale gantry crane system. Provides high-resolution kinematic state data for real-time control and validation."
    DTDFVocab:producedData GantryCraneEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance GantryCraneLoadCell : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "HX711 load cell for payload measurement in the gantry crane system, providing real-time force/torque data for safety monitoring and control adaptation."
    DTDFVocab:producedData GantryCraneLoadCellDataTransmitted
]

instance AirQualityCO2Sensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "CO2 concentration sensor deployed in the Air Quality Management system for real-time indoor air quality monitoring, integrated with Raspberry Pi for data acquisition."
    DTDFVocab:producedData AirQualityCO2DataTransmitted
]

instance AirQualityParticulateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Particulate matter sensor (unspecified type) for measuring PM2.5/PM10 concentrations in the Air Quality Management system, providing localized air quality metrics."
    DTDFVocab:producedData AirQualityParticulateDataTransmitted
]

instance AirQualityTemperatureHumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Temperature and humidity sensor for environmental monitoring in the Air Quality Management system, enabling comprehensive air quality assessment."
    DTDFVocab:producedData AirQualityEnvironmentalDataTransmitted
]

instance GreenhouseEnvironmentalSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Environmental sensor suite (temperature, humidity, light) for greenhouse monitoring in GreenhouseDT, integrated with InfluxDB for time-series data storage."
    DTDFVocab:producedData GreenhouseEnvironmentalDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance GantryCraneEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GantryCraneEncoder
]

instance GantryCraneLoadCellDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GantryCraneLoadCell
]

instance AirQualityCO2DataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AirQualityCO2Sensor
]

instance AirQualityParticulateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AirQualityParticulateSensor
]

instance AirQualityEnvironmentalDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AirQualityTemperatureHumiditySensor
]

instance GreenhouseEnvironmentalDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GreenhouseEnvironmentalSensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance GantryCraneKinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Symbolic kinematic model of the lab-scale gantry crane implemented using MATLAB Symbolic Toolbox or ROS robot_state_publisher, providing forward/inverse kinematics for trajectory planning."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo KinematicModelingEnabler
]

instance GantryCraneCADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Geometric CAD model of the gantry crane created using FreeCAD or SolidWorks, serving as the structural representation for visualization and simulation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CADModelingEnabler
]

instance AirQualityAutomationMLModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "AutomationML-based digital twin representation for Air Quality Management, encoding geometric layouts and behavioral models for airflow dynamics and virus spread simulations."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AutomationMLEngine
]

instance GreenhouseBehavioralAdaptationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Self-adaptation model for GreenhouseDT enabling dynamic behavioral adjustments in both physical and digital greenhouse systems based on environmental feedback."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BehavioralAdaptationEngine
]

instance GantryCraneTrajectoryData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data of executed trajectories from the physical gantry crane, including position, velocity, and acceleration metrics stored in TimescaleDB for validation."
    DTDFVocab:fromData GantryCraneEncoderDataTransmitted, GantryCraneLoadCellDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TrajectoryValidationEnabler
]

instance AirQualitySensorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time air quality metrics from Raspberry Pi-based sensors (CO2, particulate matter, temperature, humidity) transmitted via AutomationML interfaces."
    DTDFVocab:fromData AirQualityCO2DataTransmitted, AirQualityParticulateDataTransmitted, AirQualityEnvironmentalDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AirQualityAnalyticsEnabler
]

instance GreenhouseEnvironmentalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Historical and real-time environmental data from greenhouse sensors (temperature, humidity, light) stored in InfluxDB for behavioral adaptation and model training."
    DTDFVocab:fromData GreenhouseEnvironmentalDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GreenhouseAdaptationEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance KinematicModelingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Symbolic math tools (MATLAB Symbolic Toolbox) and robotics libraries (PyRobot, ROS robot_state_publisher) for generating forward/inverse kinematics of the gantry crane."
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryOptimizationService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance CADModelingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Open-source CAD tools (FreeCAD, Blender) and industrial software (SolidWorks) for creating geometric representations of the gantry crane system."
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance AutomationMLEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "AutomationML-based model-driven engineering framework for representing and processing digital twin models in the Air Quality Management system."
    DTDFVocab:enables AirQualitySimulationService, AirQualityPredictionService
]

instance BehavioralAdaptationEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Self-adaptation engine for GreenhouseDT enabling real-time behavioral adjustments in both physical and digital systems based on environmental feedback loops."
    DTDFVocab:enables GreenhouseSelfAdaptationService
]

instance TrajectoryValidationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Continuous validation framework using Kalman filters and CUSUM for comparing physical and digital twin trajectories in real-time (100ms latency)."
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService
]

instance AirQualityAnalyticsEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Microsoft Azure tools for runtime visualization, simulation, and predictive analytics of air quality data in the Air Quality Management system."
    DTDFVocab:enables AirQualityVisualizationService, AirQualitySimulationService, AirQualityPredictionService
]

instance GreenhouseAdaptationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "InfluxDB and ActiveMQ-based system for time-series data storage and real-time message brokering, enabling behavioral adaptation in GreenhouseDT."
    DTDFVocab:enables GreenhouseSelfAdaptationService
]

instance ROSMiddleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Robot Operating System (ROS) providing middleware for sensor fusion, actuator control, and message passing between physical and digital components of the gantry crane."
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryOptimizationService, ContinuousValidationService, FaultDetectionService
]

instance GazeboSimulationEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Ignition Gazebo simulation engine for physics-based simulation with real-time factor, enabling hardware-in-the-loop (HIL) testing of the gantry crane."
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryOptimizationService
]

instance MATLABSimulinkEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink with SimScape for multi-domain simulation (mechanical, electrical) and Real-Time Workshop for code generation for embedded controllers."
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryOptimizationService
]

instance ControlAlgorithmLibrary : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python (Pyomo, SciPy) and C++ (ROS Control) libraries for implementing model-predictive control (MPC) and PID tuning in real-time."
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryOptimizationService
]

instance FaultDetectionLibrary : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Statistical methods (CUSUM, Kalman Filters) and machine learning (Scikit-learn, TensorFlow Lite) for anomaly detection and sensor fusion in the gantry crane system."
    DTDFVocab:enables FaultDetectionService
]

instance VisualizationEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "3D rendering tools (Blender, Unity) and web dashboards (Plotly Dash, Grafana) for real-time visualization of digital twin metrics and comparative analysis."
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance DarTwinNotationEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Custom formalism for modeling system evolution, enabling versioned digital twins with traceable changes in kinematic and CAD models."
    DTDFVocab:enables SystemEvolutionService
]

// C6: Services
instance TrajectoryOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Computes time-optimal or energy-efficient motion paths for the gantry crane's trolley and hoist using kinematic constraints, implemented via MPC or PID tuning."
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalTrajectoryInsight, AdaptiveControlAction
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Monitors synchronization between physical and digital twin states using state estimation (Kalman filters) and computes error bounds (RMSE, CUSUM) for position, velocity, and load."
    DTDFVocab:provides SynchronizationStatusInsight, FaultDetectionAction
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Implements anomaly detection algorithms (machine learning classifiers, statistical process control) to identify hardware faults (motor stalls) or software errors (communication drops)."
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultAlertInsight
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides real-time 3D dashboards with CAD overlays synchronized with live sensor data, highlighting discrepancies between physical and digital states."

]

instance SystemEvolutionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Tracks changes in digital twin models (kinematic/CAD) and validates new revisions against historical data to ensure backward compatibility and performance regression testing."
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelVersionInsight, AutomatedTestingAction
]

instance AirQualityVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Renders real-time air quality metrics (CO2, particulate matter) with predictive overlays for virus spread prevention scenarios in the Air Quality Management system."

]

instance AirQualitySimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulates air quality dynamics under varying conditions (e.g., ventilation scenarios) using AutomationML-based digital twin representations."

]

instance AirQualityPredictionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predicts future air quality states using modeled data and historical trends, enabling proactive decision-making for indoor environments."

]

instance GreenhouseSelfAdaptationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enables real-time behavioral adaptation in both physical and digital greenhouse systems based on environmental feedback loops and InfluxDB-stored data."
    DTDFVocab:provides AdaptationStatusInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance OptimalTrajectoryInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Time-optimal or energy-efficient motion paths for the gantry crane's trolley and hoist, computed under kinematic constraints (jerk-limited profiles, obstacle avoidance)."
]

instance AdaptiveControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [

]

    base:desc "Real-time comparison of digital twin states (predicted positions) with physical twin measurements, including error bounds (RMSE, CUSUM) for position, velocity, and load."
]

instance FaultDetectionAction : DTDFVocab:Action [

]

]

]

]

]

]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control flows from the **Digital Twin** to the **Physical Crane** are mediated by the **Control Application**, which uses the **Physical Crane Interface** to send commands to the crane’s controllers. Command types include trajectory setpoints generated by the **Trajectory Generator Service**, which ensures optimal movement without residual swinging. Control message formats are not explicitly specified but are likely structured as kinematic trajectories (e.g., waypoints, velocity profiles) or low-level control signals (e.g., joint torques). Validation and authentication mechanisms are not described, but the **Continuous Validation Service** implicitly enforces correctness by comparing executed trajectories to simulations. Feedback systems are bidirectional: the **Logging Application** captures physical execution data, while the **Dashboard** provides real-time visualization for operators. Conflict resolution is not addressed, but the **MQTT Broker** facilitates signaling between services, potentially enabling priority-based command routing. Command execution confirmation is implied via the validation service’s comparison of simulated vs. executed trajectories, with alerts triggered for deviations."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin systems employ an **ad-hoc, lightweight orchestration** approach, avoiding commercial frameworks. The **GreenhouseDT** uses **InfluxDB** (time-series database) and **ActiveMQ** (message broker) for **event-driven coordination** between physical (greenhouse) and digital components, while the **Air Quality Management** exemplar integrates **AutomationML** for model-driven twin engineering and **Microsoft Azure tools** for pipeline orchestration. The **gantry crane** system (logistics domain) follows a **C4 Model**-based architecture, emphasizing **containerization** (e.g., Docker-like virtualization) for dissemination but lacks explicit system-wide coordination protocols. All exemplars prioritize **modularity** and **interoperability** via **single-board computers (Raspberry Pi)** and **virtualization/containerization**, with no centralized management layer documented."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "The **GreenhouseDT** system emphasizes **self-adaptive behavioral fidelity**, where both the physical greenhouse and its digital twin dynamically adjust based on real-time data and predefined adaptation rules. Validation is implicitly supported by **prerecorded data** in virtual machine images, enabling offline testing of model accuracy. The **Air Quality Management** exemplar focuses on **model-driven validation** via AutomationML, ensuring geometric and behavioral models align with physical constraints. Uncertainty quantification is not explicitly addressed, but the use of **Microsoft Azure tools** suggests integration with cloud-based analytics for error detection (e.g., anomaly detection in sensor data). Quality assurance processes are ad-hoc, relying on **runtime visualization** and **predictive simulations** to cross-validate model outputs against physical observations. No formal verification methods (e.g., formal proofs, statistical testing) or error correction protocols are documented."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The **Digital Twin**’s technical network infrastructure relies on a **TimescaleDB** database for centralized data storage, accessed by services via unspecified protocols (likely SQL or HTTP APIs). The **MQTT Broker** enables lightweight, event-driven communication between services (e.g., **Trajectory Generator Service**, **Simulation Service**, **Continuous Validation Service**). Network topology is not explicitly detailed, but the architecture suggests a star topology with the database as the core and services communicating via the broker. Bandwidth and latency requirements are not quantified, but real-time validation implies low-latency communication (likely <100ms for trajectory comparisons). Reliability and redundancy mechanisms are not described, though the **Continuous Validation Service**’s threshold-based alerts suggest fault detection. Security protocols are not specified, but the use of a dedicated **MQTT Broker** and centralized database implies controlled access (e.g., authentication for services)."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The **Digital Twin** is deployed on an unspecified infrastructure, but the architecture suggests a hybrid model: the **Physical Crane Interface**, **Control Application**, and **Logging Application** likely run on-premise (co-located with the crane hardware), while the **Digital Twin** services (e.g., **Trajectory Generator**, **Simulation Service**, **Dashboard**) may operate on edge or cloud platforms for scalability. Computational requirements are not detailed, but the **Simulation Service** and **Continuous Validation Service** imply moderate CPU/GPU needs for real-time trajectory processing. Storage requirements are met by **TimescaleDB**, optimized for time-series data. Scalability mechanisms are not described, but the modular container-based design (per C4 Model) suggests horizontal scaling for services like the **MQTT Broker** or **Dashboard**. Deployment models are not explicitly stated, but the use of Python applications and a database implies containerization (e.g., Docker) or virtualization. Availability/reliability assurance is not addressed, though the validation service’s alerting implies monitoring."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin systems demonstrate **limited horizontal integration** with external systems. The **GreenhouseDT** relies on **InfluxDB** (open-source) and **ActiveMQ** (standardized messaging) for data exchange but does not specify interoperability with enterprise systems. The **Air Quality Management** exemplar uses **AutomationML** (industry-standard for engineering data) and **Microsoft Azure** (cloud-based tools), enabling **protocol-agnostic integration** with external IoT/sensor networks but lacks explicit details on enterprise system dependencies. The **gantry crane** system (logistics domain) does not document external integrations, though its **cyber-physical** nature suggests potential for **OPC UA** or **MQTT**-based interoperability with port logistics systems. No standardized APIs or Digital Twin frameworks (e.g., Siemens MindSphere, PTC ThingWorx) are employed."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Air Quality Management exemplar adheres to:
  - **AutomationML** for digital twin modeling and interoperability.
  - **Microsoft Azure tools** (likely compliant with **ISO/IEC 25010** for cloud-based systems, though not explicitly stated).
  The GreenhouseDT exemplar uses:
  - **InfluxDB** (time-series database standard: **InfluxData’s line protocol**).
  - **ActiveMQ** (JMS/AMQP-compliant message broker).
  The gantry crane exemplar lacks explicit standardization details but employs the **C4 Model** (a software architecture modeling standard). **No certification requirements or compliance frameworks** (e.g., IEC 62443 for cyber-physical systems) are mentioned. Interoperability is implied via **containerization/virtualization** and **GitHub dissemination**, but no formal standards (e.g., OPC UA, FIWARE) are referenced."
]
